attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WDQR.BK_QUOTE_NUM, WDQR.RU_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, WDQR.QUOTE_NAME, WDQR.LDAP_USER_ID, WDQR.DEAL_QUOTE_STATUS_CD, 
WDQR.APPROVAL_ROUTE_CD, WDQR.GROSS_MARGIN_PCT, WDQR.DEAL_QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DT, WDQR.SRC_RPRTD_TTL_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT, 
WDQR.SRC_RPRTD_TTL_NET_PRC_USD_AMT, WDQR.SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_PRDT_DSCNT_PCT, WDQR.SRC_RPRTD_EFCTV_SVC_DSCNT_PCT, 
WDQR.SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, WDQR.SOURCE_CREATED_DTM, WDQR.SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID, WDQR.SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID, 
WDQR.PRICE_LIST_NAME, WDQR.BK_DEAL_ID, WDQR.LAST_PRICE_DTM, WDQR.FROM_CURRENCY_CD, WDQR.FEDERAL_FLG, WDQR.TRADE_ACT_FLG, 
WDQR.CONVERSION_DT, WDQR.ERATE_FLG, WDQR.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT, WDQR.ACTIVE_FLG, WDQR.TO_CURRENCY_CD, WDQR.FRAME_AGREEMENT_FLG, 
WDQR.PARTNER_BILL_TO_LOCATOR_KEY, WDQR.INTENDED_USE_CD, WDQR.BOM_SOURCE_CD, WDQR.FULFILLMENT_TYPE_CD, WDQR.TRADE_IN_FLG, 
WDQR.CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_FLG, WDQR.IS_QUOTE_TO_ORGER_ELIGiBLE_FLG, WDQR.DISTRIBUTOR_ORDERABLE_FLG, WDQR.AUTO_NEGOTIATE_FLG, 
WDQR.IS_STRINGENT_FLG, WDQR.IS_FINALIZED_FLG, WDQR.REUSABLE_NON_STNDRD_DSCNT_ROLE, WDQR.CISCO_BOOKINGS_NEUTRALITY_ROLE, 
WDQR.RU_PARENT_QUOTE_NUM, WDQR.RU_CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBILITY_FLG, 
WDQR.DV_RNSD_PARENT_ID,
WDQR.EDW_CREATE_DTM, WDQR.EDW_CREATE_USER, WDQR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, WDQR.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
WDQR.CRP_FLG, 
WDQR.GDR_FLG,
WDQR.INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
WDQR.CBN_STATUS_CD,
WDQR.LEAD_PTNR_TYPE_CD_INT,
WDQR.LEAD_PTNR_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
WDQR.SS_CODE,
WDQR.BUY_METHOD_CHANNEL_CD,
WDQR.IS_PUBLIC_CLD_MARKETPLACE_FLG 
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_DEAL_QUOTE_RNWL WDQR
 WHERE NOT EXISTS 
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE ND
    WHERE WDQR.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = ND.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT
    AND WDQR.SS_CODE = ND.SS_CODE)
